pool.clearHint: Empty the picker pool and reset the selection

stage.preparingWorkflowDetail: Hang on — converting workflow to api JSON. Try Run again in a moment.

error.upstreamNotReadyDetail: Upstream not ready: {list}. Run those stage(s) first so they produce a snapshot, then Run this stage again.
error.workerDied: Backend stopped without sending a result. The prompt worker likely died (CUDA OOM during cleanup is the usual cause). Restart ComfyUI to recover.

assets.title: Asset Library
assets.empty: No assets yet — add images, video, or audio to reuse them across projects.
assets.emptyCategory: No assets in this category yet.
assets.addTooltip: Upload images, video, or audio into the library (or drag & drop them onto this panel)
assets.dropHint: Drop files to add them to the library

category.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? It is removed from all assets; the assets and files on disk stay.

card.deleteConfirm: Remove this asset from the library? The file on disk stays.

assetLoader.empty: No matching assets in the library yet — add some in the Assets panel.
assetLoader.pickHint: Pick an asset from the library to use as this node's output.

stageParams.addHint: Attach a parameter defined in the ComfyTV sidebar

sidebar.title: Stage Parameters
sidebar.empty: No parameters defined for this stage yet.
sidebar.label: Label
sidebar.sliderHint: Set both min & max to show a slider on the node (otherwise a number field).
sidebar.deleteConfirm: Delete this parameter? Workflows binding to it will lose the binding.

promptHelper.open: Prompt helper — quick starters & enhancement tags

cameraPrompt.open: Cinematic camera — compile camera/lens/aperture into the prompt
cameraPrompt.empty: Pick a camera, lens, focal length or aperture to build a cinematic suffix.

imageRefs.title: Image references
imageRefs.empty: No reference images — click + to pin one from the library.
imageRefs.warnDuplicate: Reference slot #{n} is pinned by multiple images — only the last one applies at run.
imageRefs.warnOverride: Reference slot #{n} already has an upstream connection — the pinned image overrides it at run.
imageRefs.warnOverflow: The workflow binds only {total} reference slot(s) — {count} pinned image(s) won't be consumed.
imageRefs.warnNoSlots: This workflow has no image input that can receive reference images — they'll be ignored at run.

promptAssets.addTooltip: Insert an image asset from the library — it will be sent as a reference image at run
promptAssets.empty: No matching assets — add some in the sidebar Assets tab.
promptAssets.missing: asset #{id} was removed from the library — this chip is ignored at run
promptAssets.slotEmpty: This workflow has no reference-image slots bound yet — bind a LoadImage to "Upstream image #N" in the sidebar workflow config first.

configSidebar.title: Workflow Config
configSidebar.empty: Select a stage node on the canvas to edit its workflow config.
configSidebar.noWorkflowPicked: This stage's workflow combo is empty — pick one first.
configSidebar.noExposedWidgets: This workflow has no editable widgets, or hasn't been prepared yet — pick it on any stage first so the browser can analyze it.
configSidebar.pickWorkflowFirst: Pick this workflow on any stage first to populate widget metadata (the browser-side graphToPrompt has to run).
configSidebar.exportPresetTooltip: Download the current bindings as a *_preset.json file. Drop it next to the workflow JSON in workflows/<kind>/ to ship these defaults to other users.
configSidebar.resetToPresetTooltip: Wipe all bindings + meta for this workflow and re-apply its shipped _preset.json from disk. Your own edits will be lost.
configSidebar.resetToPresetConfirm: Reset all bindings for this workflow to the shipped preset? Your edits will be lost.
configSidebar.conversionMayHaveFailed: ComfyTV may have failed to convert this workflow. Export an API-format JSON from ComfyUI (Save (API Format)) and upload it here — name it as the matching .api.json next to the workflow.
configSidebar.uploadApiTooltip: Attach a Save (API Format) export to this workflow. It's stored as <name>.api.json next to the workflow and used directly, skipping conversion.
configSidebar.uploadApiOk: API prompt saved ({n} nodes) — workflow ready.
configSidebar.resultHintAuto: Auto-detected from save / preview nodes. Pick a node to override which one produces this stage's output.
configSidebar.resultHintSet: This node's output is used as the stage result.
configSidebar.linkedSourceHint: This workflow lives in ComfyUI's own library. Edit it there and save — changes sync automatically.
configSidebar.linkBrokenHint: The source workflow is missing from ComfyUI's library (moved, renamed, or deleted). Re-create it or unlink.
configSidebar.unlinkConfirm: Unlink "{label}"? The ComfyUI workflow file is kept — only the ComfyTV reference is removed.

project.label: Current Project
project.delete: Delete this project (files on disk stay)
project.delete_confirm: Delete this project? DB rows will be cleared; files on disk stay.

edit.label: Edit Image
edit.tooltip: Edits that change size or need rich UI (HD / outpaint / inpaint / erase / cutout / crop)

panorama.label: Panorama
panorama.tooltip: Turn this image into a panorama and explore viewpoints

multiangle.label: Multi-angle
multiangle.tooltip: Re-render this image from a different camera angle

relight.label: Relight
relight.tooltip: Brightness / color / rim-light, or reference another image's lighting

preset.label: Presets
preset.tooltip: Size-preserving, no-rich-UI preset transforms (multi-view / grid / scene progression)

extend.label: Extend
extend.tooltip: Extract this clip's last frame and spawn a new VideoStage using it as the I2V start frame — write a prompt for the continuation

change.label: Edit Video
change.tooltip: Modify an existing video: clip / HD / subtitle erase / audio separation

refine.label: Refine
refine.tooltip: Continue rewriting in a new TextStage

view-current.label: Current View
view-current.tooltip: Extract the current viewport as a single image

view-four.label: 4 Views
view-four.tooltip: Extract 4 viewpoints as an image batch

view-twelve.label: 12 Views
view-twelve.tooltip: Extract 12 viewpoints as an image batch

gen-shots.label: Generate Shot Images
gen-shots.tooltip: Spawn a Shot Images stage wired to this storyboard — iterates the shot list and renders one image per shot

multi-cam-9.label: Multi-cam 9-grid
multi-cam-9.tooltip: 9 camera angles arranged in a grid

cinematic-light.label: Cinematic Lighting
cinematic-light.tooltip: Apply cinematic lighting and color grade

hd.label: HD
hd.tooltip: Upscale to a higher resolution (output is larger)

outpaint.label: Outpaint
outpaint.tooltip: Extend the canvas outward (output is larger)

cutout.label: Cutout
cutout.tooltip: Extract the subject with a transparent background

rotate.label: Rotate
rotate.tooltip: Rotate by an angle (browser-side, no GPU)

grid.label: Grid Split
grid.tooltip: Slice into an R×C grid of tiles (browser-side) → image batch

clip.label: Clip
clip.tooltip: Clip / trim — pick start and end times

crop.label: Crop
crop.tooltip: Spatial crop — keep a rectangle (x, y, w, h) of every frame

resize.label: Resize
resize.tooltip: Scale video to a target width × height (use -1 to auto-derive from aspect)

extract-frame.label: Extract Frame
extract-frame.tooltip: Pull a single frame out as an image (first / last / middle / custom seconds)

subtitle-select.label: Region Subtitle Erase
subtitle-select.tooltip: Manually box a region to erase (needs region-selector UI)

demux.label: Demux A/V
demux.tooltip: Split into audio track + silent video (two nodes spawned)

imageCrop.noInputImage: No input image — connect an image upstream
imageCrop.adjustToApply: Drag the rectangle or pick a ratio to apply

panorama.empty: No panorama yet — upload an HDRI / equirect image or click Run with an upstream image
panorama.clearUploadTooltip: Drop the manual source — Run will then derive from upstream again

imageCompare.noImages: Connect two images to compare (A / B)

storyboard.empty: No shots yet — Run to generate from the premise, or add shots manually
storyboard.regenerate: Regenerate this shot via the LLM (keeps the rest)

timeline.connectImages: Connect images upstream to use as shots
timeline.clickKeyframe: Click a keyframe above to add a shot
timeline.noAudio: Connect audio upstream to add a track

gridSplit.pickGrid: Pick a grid preset or set rows × cols
gridSplit.done: Split into {n} tiles — ready for downstream

panoramaView.orbitToCapture: Drag to look around — releasing captures the view
panoramaView.adjustCountToCapture: Move the slider to capture views

rotate.adjustToApply: Slide or click a quick angle to apply

mention.invalidLabel: Invalid label — start with a letter / underscore (Chinese is fine), then letters / digits / _ / -
mention.noEntries: No entries yet — type a label to create one
mention.contentPlaceholder: Content this {'@'}-token expands to. (For characters / other kinds, use the ComfyTV button → Entries dialog.)

entries.refHelpPre: Reference any entry in a stage's prompt with
entries.confirmDelete: Delete {'@'}{label}? Existing {'@'}{label} tokens will fall back to literal text.
entries.labelError: Start with a letter / underscore (Chinese is fine), then letters / digits / _ / -

valuePreview.fromUpstream: From the connected upstream batch — remove it upstream, not here

run.stagesRunPerNode: ComfyTV stages run individually — use each node's Run button. Nothing to run with the global Run here.

workflowLink.title: Link a ComfyUI workflow
workflowLink.intro: Link a workflow from ComfyUI's own library. Edit it normally in ComfyUI and save — ComfyTV picks up your changes automatically.
workflowLink.empty: No workflows found in ComfyUI's library.
